# Codex Small Business Skills

Apache-2.0 Codex port of Anthropic's Small Business skills.

Source:
- https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins

Core files:
- README.md: overview, install, use cases, included skills
- manifest.json: machine-readable package metadata
- ATTRIBUTION.md: upstream attribution and modifications
- LICENSE: Apache License 2.0
- docs/SUBMISSION_KIT.md: launch and directory submission copy

Use cases:
- small business AI workflows
- Codex skills
- Claude Code plugin port
- cash-flow snapshot
- invoice follow-up
- CRM cleanup
- customer support reply drafting
- lead triage
- content strategy
- hiring packets

Important:
These skills assist workflows. They do not provide legal, tax, financial,
accounting, employment, or HR advice.
